user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter the attendance summary by a From and To date range, so that I can review team attendance for a specific period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Attendance Summary screen; When I select From and To dates and click Search; Then the summary is generated for that date range

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle between active and inactive employees, so that I can include or exclude former staff from the summary
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Attendance Summary screen; When I choose Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the summary reflects only the selected employee group

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter by department, position level, employee class and shift, so that I can narrow the summary to a specific group
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Attendance Summary screen; When I select department, position level, employee class or shift and click Search; Then only matching employees appear in the summary

user_story: As a Manager, I want to enable Show today data, so that I can quickly view attendance for the current day
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Attendance Summary screen; When I enable Show today data and refresh; Then the summary shows attendance for today

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see scheduled hours, leaves, official visit, client location, personal out time, WFH, breaks, total and effective hours per employee, so that I can analyse work patterns
acceptance_criteria: Given the summary is generated; When results are displayed; Then each row shows scheduled, number of leaves, non working days, official visit, client location, personal out time, WFH, breaks, break duration, total duration, effective hours and extra hours

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view a totals row aggregating all employees' hours, so that I can gauge overall team effort at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given the summary lists multiple employees; When the grid renders; Then a Total row sums the hour and count columns

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my selections and run a fresh summary
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their defaults
